scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/types && npm run lint -w packages/ui && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/types && npm run typecheck -w packages/ui && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
